creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Fri, 21 Feb 2014 15:45:33 -0800
Josh Paetzel <josh@tcbug.org> wrote:

> There's a patch file in this diff called off-patch-Makefile that doesn't
> seem to be used or applied.  What is this for?
> 

It is the old patch-Makefile, which I set off. It differs from the new one in the lack of
"-lfontconfig" in the "XLIBS = $(MOTIFL)/libXm.a -lXp -lXt -lXext -lXmu -lX11 -lXft
-lfontconfig" settings I use to avoid a failure.

Oliver
